title: ehretia cymosa var. divaricata
intro: Ehretia cymosa var. divaricata, also known as the 'divaricating ehretia', is a plant species in the Loganiaceae family, native to tropical regions in Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat wounds, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Ehretia cymosa var. divaricata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
